note: Official base (infotech.gov.ua ticket/4570) confirms exact text+options in our order (1 Обидва водії / 2 Тільки білого / 3 Тільки синього). Three reputable bases (testpdr.online/manualov q671, pomahach) mark 'Обидва водії' correct per ПДР 16.2: each driver turning right/left yields to pedestrians crossing the road they turn onto, so both yield = our option 1. Stored answer was 2 (white only) — wrong.
